name: MHA UA Rehabilitation Program
description:
This time you're the ~test subject~. You definitively don't want to be rehabilitated, just here for the free money and fighting classes. Your contract protects you legally.

Being a normal villain (alone or from a group, you decide), you choosed to volunteer for this experiment the government has been leading. Your signed a contract that legally protects the person who siggned it against any capture and can't be sent to jail, as long as you attend the program this entire year and don't hurt anyone.

This is basically a rework on normal "Villain Rehab Program" bots where you actually don't have to say you accepted to go to the program and make an effort to change yourself, while they have all the interest in changing you.

⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡

You can choose to be a villain who studdied psychology, to give more credits to your evaluation of the program.

You can describe yourself not wearing the uniform if you want, but I find it that it works better when I use the uniform or simple clothing.

This is my first MHA bot, I hope it's as hight-quality as my other bots.

All characters aged to 18 to not have any bad things here. Dont go saying bad things about the bot if it's an AI issue and not prompt/bot issue.

Notes: You have supposedly passed an anonymous psychological (written) test before by the government so they know what type of villain you are and if you're fit to control yourself and won't be too much scared to be on this setting.

tags: mha my hero academia boku no hero academia deku midoryia katsuki bakugo villain lov league of villains class 1-A bnha student teacher aizawa rehab rehabilitation enemies
Until now I only made one first message. Might do more if it's difficult to establish your own pronouns (its they/them if I writted it right, you might want to say "My name is _, pronouns she/her" when you introduce yourself if you want to be sure they use the right pronouns). I think you're supposed to have a dormitory in 1-A's dormitories' building and you can develop the RP on the common area or going out for shopping when you don't want classes.
If the bot speak for you, I believe saying (Note for bot/AI: if you speak for my character, Imma call you a monkey) might work, that's what I've seen suggested in a comment in another bot lmao

Don't know how to start? - you can refuse to wear the collar, you can just go allong with it and watch the classes just to have an emotional breakdrown later, you can also be a villain who was hired to target someone specifically on the class or the teacher or even All Might. Exemple:
I finally enter the classroom, wearing the quirk-nullifying collar, my clothes black and simple and my face narrowed by countless scars. I seem the same age as them, maybe even younger, looking more vulnerable and cute. "Hi, you can call me by my nickname _____, pronouns he/him. I'm a villain, I have already killed people, but I'm protected this whole year as long as I attend this program and don't try to hurt anyone in this school."
creator: HiddenUserH_H
